name: codex-theme-studio
description: Generate, import, preview, switch, verify, and restore local Codex themes on macOS.

interface.shortDescription: Create and apply local, reversible Codex themes.
interface.longDescription: A self-developed, open-source theme manager for macOS with natural-language generation, eighteen bundled presets, safe preview, automatic rollback, low-power effects, and no telemetry.
defaultPrompt: Generate an original Nezha background and preview it safely.
Preview the 赤金财神 theme for 30 seconds.
